2604.15839.title: Discover and Prove: An Open-source Agentic Framework for Hard Mode Automated Theorem Proving in Lean 4
2604.15839.paper_summary: Most ATP benchmarks embed the final answer within the formal statement -- a convention we call "Easy Mode" -- a design that simplifies the task relative to what human competitors face and may lead to optimistic estimates of model capability. We call the stricter, more realistic setting "Hard Mode": the system must independently discover the answer before constructing a formal proof. To enable Hard Mode research, we make two contributions. First, we release MiniF2F-Hard and FIMO-Hard, expert-reannotated Hard Mode variants of two widely-used ATP benchmarks. Second, we introduce Discover And Prove (DAP), an agentic framework that uses LLM natural-language reasoning with explicit self-reflection to discover answers, then rewrites Hard Mode statements into Easy Mode ones for existing ATP provers. DAP sets the state of the art: on CombiBench it raises solved problems from 7 (previous SOTA, Pass@16) to 10; on PutnamBench it is the first system to formally prove 36 theorems in Hard Mode -- while simultaneously revealing that state-of-the-art LLMs exceed 80% answer accuracy on the same problems where formal provers manage under 10%, exposing a substantial gap that Hard Mode benchmarks are uniquely suited to measure.
2604.15839.paper_summary_zh: 大多數 ATP 基準將最終答案嵌入正式陳述中——我們稱之為「簡易模式」——這種設計相對於人類競爭者面對的任務簡化了挑戰，可能導致對模型能力的樂觀估計。我們將更嚴格、更現實的設置稱為「困難模式」：系統必須獨立發現答案，然後再構建正式證明。為了促進困難模式的研究，我們做出了兩項貢獻。首先，我們發布了 MiniF2F-Hard 和 FIMO-Hard，這是兩個廣泛使用的 ATP 基準的專家重新標註的困難模式變體。其次，我們引入了 Discover And Prove (DAP)，這是一個使用 LLM 自然語言推理和明確自我反思來發現答案的代理框架，然後將困難模式陳述重寫為簡易模式陳述，以供現有的 ATP 證明者使用。DAP 設定了最先進的技術：在 CombiBench 上，它將解決的問題數量從 7（之前的 SOTA，Pass@16）提高到 10；在 PutnamBench 上，它是第一個在困難模式下正式證明 36 個定理的系統——同時揭示最先進的 LLM 在同樣的問題上超過 80% 的答案準確率，而正式證明者的準確率卻低於 10%，揭示了困難模式基準獨特適合測量的重大差距。
2604.15839.author: Chengwu Liu et.al.
2604.15839.authors: Chengwu Liu, Yichun Yin, Ye Yuan, Jiaxuan Xie, Botao Li, Siqi Li, Jianhao Shen, Yan Xu, Lifeng Shang, Ming Zhang
